creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed with a few minor changes: 

First letter in COMMENT must be a capital. 
Provide WWW: web site in DESCR. 
Whitespace cleanups in Makefile (looked like a cut&paste). 
Whom: should contain name and e-mail address in Makefile. 

Thanks!
